testcase.name: Admin adds a new employee and it reflects in the Express API
testcase.system-out: Given the application is open at "http://localhost:5173/"...................passed When I click the "Admin Portal" card........................................passed Then the admin login form should appear.....................................passed When I enter username "admin" and password "admin123".......................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be redirected to the admin dashboard..........................passed When I click the Employees nav item.........................................passed Then the Employee Details page should be displayed..........................passed And the employee search box should be visible...............................passed When I click the Add Employee button........................................passed Then the Add Employee modal should open.....................................passed When I fill the employee name with "Selenium Test User".....................passed And I fill the employee email with "selenium.test@techems.com"..............passed And I fill the employee role with "QA Automation Engineer"..................passed And I fill the employee phone with "+91 99988 77766"........................passed And I fill the employee location with "Chennai, India"......................passed And I click the submit Add Employee button..................................passed Then the Add Employee modal should close....................................passed And the new employee "Selenium Test User" should appear in the employee list.passed And the employee should be saved to the Express API at "http://localhost:5000/api/employees".passed

testcase.name: Admin adds a second employee and verifies both are in the list
testcase.system-out: Given the application is open at "http://localhost:5173/"...................passed When I click the "Admin Portal" card........................................passed Then the admin login form should appear.....................................passed When I enter username "admin" and password "admin123".......................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be redirected to the admin dashboard..........................passed When I click the Employees nav item.........................................passed Then the Employee Details page should be displayed..........................passed When I click the Add Employee button........................................passed Then the Add Employee modal should open.....................................passed When I fill the employee name with "Integration Test User"..................passed And I fill the employee email with "integration.test@techems.com"...........passed And I fill the employee role with "Backend Developer".......................passed And I fill the employee phone with "+91 88877 66655"........................passed And I fill the employee location with "Hyderabad, India"....................passed And I click the submit Add Employee button..................................passed Then the Add Employee modal should close....................................passed And the new employee "Integration Test User" should appear in the employee list.passed

testcase.classname: Employee Management System - Full Navigation Flow
testcase.name: Admin logs in and views Employee Details
testcase.system-out: Given the application is open at "http://localhost:5173/"...................passed When I click the "Admin Portal" card........................................passed Then the admin login form should appear.....................................passed When I enter username "admin" and password "admin123".......................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be redirected to the admin dashboard..........................passed When I click the Employees nav item.........................................passed Then the Employee Details page should be displayed..........................passed And the employee search box should be visible...............................passed When I click view on the first employee.....................................passed Then the employee detail modal should open..................................passed

testcase.classname: Employee Management System - Full Navigation Flow
testcase.name: Employee logs in and views their Dashboard
testcase.system-out: Given the application is open at "http://localhost:5173/"...................passed When I click the "Employee Portal" card.....................................passed Then the employee login form should appear..................................passed When I enter username "asbar" and password "emp123".........................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should be redirected to the employee dashboard.......................passed And the employee attendance card should be visible..........................passed And the employee salary card should be visible..............................passed When I click the My Profile nav item........................................passed Then the profile page should be displayed...................................passed
